leadText: Syrup Bomb (Japanese: みずあめボム Mizuame Bomb) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced during Generation IX, in The Teal Mask. It is the signature move of Dipplin and one of the signature moves of Hydrapple.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Syrup Bomb inflicts damage and lowers the target's Speed stat by one stage each turn, for the next three turns. It does not affect targets with Bulletproof . If the move's user leaves the field, the effect will end immediately. The game uses a unique animation when the target's Speed stat is lowered.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user sets off an explosion of sticky candy syrup, which coats the target and causes the target's Speed stat to drop each turn for three turns.
